entry.title: Am I crazy???
entry.content: Am I crazy???

entry.content: Always a humbling experience

entry.title: At what point does it end???

entry.title: Cvnt

entry.title: Enjoy some big sister advice on men 💕

entry.title: Can we not be used as political ammo? Thanks!
entry.content: Can we not be used as political ammo? Thanks!

entry.title: The things they’ve called me over the years #trans #glowup #transformation
entry.content: The things they’ve called me over the years #trans #glowup #transformation

entry.title: I was in a disgustingly stuck up mood throughout this video! It was the outfit, not me 👀
entry.content: I was in a disgustingly stuck up mood throughout this video! It was the outfit, not me 👀

entry.title: Replying to @ryank620 Would you deny a diabetic child insulin? #trans #model #runway
entry.content: Replying to @ryank620 Would you deny a diabetic child insulin? #trans #model #runway

entry.title: Considering what shes been through I dont blame her 😔
entry.content: Considering what shes been through I dont blame her 😔

entry.title: I hope she comes out of her shell soon 😭😭
entry.content: I hope she comes out of her shell soon 😭😭

entry.title: Just a thought
entry.content: Just a thought

entry.title: 3 months ago I sent that video to @Evangeline James and @AJ Clementine after I made one of the scariest decisions in my adult life. I was so scared and they helped me heal every step of the way! I had no idea how much beauty I was in for!
entry.content: 3 months ago I sent that video to @Evangeline James and @AJ Clementine after I made one of the scariest decisions in my adult life. I was so scared and they helped me heal every step of the way! I had no idea how much beauty I was in for!

entry.title: Men always think I’m so dumb 😂
entry.content: Men always think I’m so dumb 😂

entry.title: I feel better because I feel NOTHING!
entry.content: I feel better because I feel NOTHING!

entry.title: What is this dance? Serving you everything and nothing at the same time.
entry.content: What is this dance? Serving you everything and nothing at the same time.

entry.title: The soft life awaits me…
entry.content: The soft life awaits me…

entry.title: Imagine wasting energy on a man who isn’t 100% sure about you. Ew…
entry.content: Imagine wasting energy on a man who isn’t 100% sure about you. Ew…

entry.title: Gloria raised me 😌
entry.content: Gloria raised me 😌

entry.title: The one thing better than a ring!!!
entry.content: The one thing better than a ring!!!

entry.title: But apparently its the things you didnt want to go to that end up being the most fun 🤷🏼‍♀️
entry.content: But apparently its the things you didnt want to go to that end up being the most fun 🤷🏼‍♀️

entry.title: Entering my dating advice era! Every phase of life comes with important lessons! This was the biggest lesson of my 20s thus far!

entry.title: I am a biological woman now.
entry.content: I am a biological woman now.

entry.content: VANESSA 🔮🐚 #halloween

entry.title: I’ve always though Vanessa from the little mermaid was honestly the most cvnt disney villain! If I was Ursula I would’ve stayed like that forever!!!
entry.content: I’ve always though Vanessa from the little mermaid was honestly the most cvnt disney villain! If I was Ursula I would’ve stayed like that forever!!!

entry.title: He didn’t look like Hayden Christensen anyway so 🤷🏽‍♀️
entry.content: He didn’t look like Hayden Christensen anyway so 🤷🏽‍♀️
